scripts.build: vp build --ssr src/index.tsx && rm -rf dist/client && mkdir -p dist/client && cp -a public/. dist/client/
scripts.deploy: vp run build && vp exec wrangler deploy --config dist/umaxica_apps_jump_app_apex/wrangler.json
scripts.deploy:upload: vp run build && vp exec wrangler versions upload --config dist/umaxica_apps_jump_app_apex/wrangler.json
scripts.type: vp run cf-typegen && vp exec tsgo --noEmit
